#!/usr/bin/env php <?php declare(strict_types=1); use ParaTest\Util\PhpstormHelper; require dirname(__DIR__, 1) . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'src' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'Util' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'PhpstormHelper.php'; require PhpstormHelper::handleArgvFromPhpstorm($_SERVER['argv'], __DIR__ . '/paratest');
